properties.name: Resilient305 ArcGIS Hub Data Platform
properties.description: GM&B municipalities will have the opportunity to request access to the latest resilience data and create their own initiatives, facilitating data sharing and improving intergovernmental collaboration. The ArcGIS Hub will also create an opportunity to help keep the general community updated on the progress of the Resilient305 Strategy.

Upload Stormwater Masterplan data and other relevant data to Resilient305 ArcGIS Hub... LEAD(S): DoIT

GM&B municipalities will have the opportunity to request access to the latest resilience data and create their own initiatives, facilitating data sharing and improving intergovernmental collaboration.
The ArcGIS Hub will also create an opportunity to help keep the general community updated on the progress of the Resilient305 Strategy.
Develop and implement plan for sharing City data related to flood, heat, and storm risks and monitoring impacts of installed green and grey solutions.
Develop and implement plan for sharing City data related to flood, heat, and storm risks and monitoring impacts of installed green and grey solutions.
Develop and implement plan for sharing City data related to flood, heat, and storm risks and monitoring impacts of installed green and grey solutions.
Create a resilience data repository and GIS platform accessible to all City departments.
The ArcGIS Hub will also create an opportunity to help keep the general community updated on the progress of the Resilient305 Strategy.
